## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Scope

- [ ] Library or sketch behavior
- [ ] Example or hardware setup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build, CI, or packaging
- [ ] Other

## Checks

- [ ] Relevant sketches compile
- [ ] Relevant examples still work
- [ ] Documentation updated, if behavior changed
- [ ] `git diff --check` passes

## Notes

Mention target boards, Arduino cores, display/input libraries, wiring changes, or generated artifacts tested.
